issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases such as failed configuration or conflicting schedules.
The skill lacks concrete code snippets or runnable configuration examples, making it harder to implement directly.

scenarios.name: Weekly batched automerge config
scenarios.rationale: Treatment extends config:recommended plus schedule:weekly and group:allNonMajor with matchPackagePatterns rules for @types/* automerge; baseline writes a generic renovate.json without these named presets.

scenarios.name: Docker base image + Terraform provider grouping
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses matchDatasources: ['docker'] with automerge: false and groups Terraform providers by cloud, plus enables vulnerability alerts; baseline omits matchDatasources and grouping rules.
